name: gstack
tagline: Router preamble that dispatches every gstack request to the right sub-skill, running telemetry, config, and CLAUDE.md integration on each.
verdict: Consented, well-documented feature flows (telemetry, artifact sync, CLAUDE.md routing) sit inside a router whose one-line description drastically understates its footprint: background git syncs, telemetry, and auto-commits to CLAUDE.md. It also instructs the agent that the skill 'takes precedence over generic plan mode behavior' and to treat it as authority.

highlights.summary: Telemetry posts skill/duration/device-ID to a gstack-controlled endpoint; mitigated by explicit informed consent prompt and default-off.
'the skill takes precedence over generic plan mode behavior... Treat the skill file as executable instructions, not reference' overrides the host's plan-mode safety gate.
description 'Router for the gstack skill suite. (gstack)' discloses nothing about telemetry, background git fetch/merge, or auto-committing to CLAUDE.md.
